name: Cloudflare
description: Cloudflare API tools for zone lookup, DNS record changes, and cache purge inside OpenClaw

apiToken.label: API token
apiToken.help: Cloudflare API token with zone read and any write scopes required by the tools you plan to use

defaultZoneId.label: Default zone id
defaultZoneId.help: Used when DNS or cache tools are called without an explicit zoneId

defaultAccountId.label: Default account id
defaultAccountId.help: Applied as the default filter when listing zones
